justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all of the user's temporal preferences, including the initial correction from May to June and all subsequent date and time requests.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent consistently reported unavailability and then offered the user to pick a new time or consider an online meeting, without proactively suggesting alternative in-branch slots.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent made multiple API calls for each date and time requested by the user, even when a broader search might have been more efficient, particularly in Turn 10 where it checked each weekday individually.
justifications.customer_experience: The customer experience was frustrating due to the agent's inability to find any in-branch appointments and its repetitive suggestions, leading to a long and unproductive conversation.

overall_notes: The agent's inability to find any available appointments for an in-branch meeting, despite numerous attempts and expanding the search criteria, made the conversation very frustrating for the user. While the agent understood the temporal requests, its negotiation strategy was weak, primarily asking the user to provide new dates rather than offering a range of alternatives.
